How it works

Teen steps, bas.

📩

Bhejo

Koi bhi suspicious message, link, screenshot, UPI ID, ya phone number forward kar do — Telegram ya WhatsApp pe.

🔍

Hum Check Karte Hain

Common risk signals, known scam patterns, aur cross-user entity database pe check hota hai — seconds mein.

🛡

Clear Answer

Safe, Suspicious, Likely Scam, ya "Can't Tell" — aur reason bhi, taaki aap khud decide kar sako.

What you can check

Kuch bhi suspicious lage.

💬

Forwarded Messages

WhatsApp ya Telegram se aaya koi bhi message jo suspicious lage.

🔗

Links & URLs

Phishing links, fake bank sites, suspicious offers — sab check hota hai.

📸

Payment Screenshots

Fake PhonePe, GPay, ya Paytm screenshots — seller ke liye game changer.

📱

UPI IDs & Phone Numbers

Verify karo before you pay — entity database cross-check hota hai.

💼

Job Offers

Registration fee maangne wali fake recruiters — instantly flag hoti hain.

📈

Investment Pitches

Guaranteed returns wale Telegram groups — classic scam pattern detect hota hai.

Honest rahe, always.

✅

Common scam patterns detect karta hoon — India ke specific fraud types including task scams, fake payments, KYC fraud.

✅

"Can't Tell" bolta hoon jab evidence insufficient ho — false confidence se better hai honest uncertainty.

🚫

Main police nahi hoon. Main report nahi kar sakta, FIR nahi hogi. 1930 ya cybercrime.gov.in use karo fraud ke baad.

🚫

100% guarantee nahi hai. New scam patterns evolve hote hain. Always apna bank app se verify karo payment ke liye.

Pehle check karo.

Free hai. Signup nahi chahiye. Bas forward karo.

Telegram pe try karo WhatsApp pe try karo

Every check helps build India's fraud intelligence database anonymously. Aapka identity data nahi, sirf fraud intelligence.
